<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Internet Initiative Japan](https://www.iij.ad.jp/en/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/iij/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "iij"
  dnsCredentials:
    # IIJ_API_ACCESS_KEY: API access key
    apiAccessKey: ""
    # IIJ_API_SECRET_KEY: API secret key
    apiSecretKey: ""
    # IIJ_DO_SERVICE_CODE: DO service code
    doServiceCode: ""
    # IIJ_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 4)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # IIJ_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 240)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # IIJ_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
